name: SIP Response Orchestration (Wazuh -> Shuffle -> kamcmd-relay)
description: Stage-3 graded SOAR workflow (docs/09_soar_runbook.md). Webhook receives high-severity Wazuh SIP alerts, validates the source IP literal, deduplicates per src_ip against ngn_sip.soar_cases, enriches from ClickHouse (ml_scores, llm_verdicts, suricata_alerts), applies the graded-response policy (ban only when Stage 1/2 corroborates or Wazuh level >= 12), enforces via kamcmd-relay (kamcmd htable.sets ban_table), always records a ngn_sip.soar_cases evidence row, and optionally notifies. kamailio-autoban remains the deterministic backstop.

workflow_variables.description: ClickHouse HTTP endpoint on the sip_lab network (CLICKHOUSE_HTTP_URL)
workflow_variables.name: clickhouse_http_url

workflow_variables.description: Bearer token for kamcmd-relay (KAMCMD_BLOCK_RELAY_TOKEN); provision_shuffle.sh overwrites from .env
workflow_variables.name: kamcmd_relay_token

workflow_variables.description: ML proba at/above which SOAR bans outright (ATTACK_SCORE_BAN_THRESHOLD)
workflow_variables.name: attack_score_ban_threshold

workflow_variables.description: ML proba below which no containment happens (ATTACK_SCORE_LOW_THRESHOLD)
workflow_variables.name: attack_score_low_threshold

workflow_variables.description: ML proba treated as high-confidence attack corroboration (ML_ATTACK_SCORE_HIGH)
workflow_variables.name: ml_attack_score_high

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The code to run. Can be a file ID from within Shuffle.
parameters.value:
import json, re
srcip = str("""$exec.all_fields.data.srcip""").strip()
rule_id = str("""$exec.rule_id""").strip()
rule_level = str("""$exec.all_fields.rule.level""").strip()
alert_id = str("""$exec.all_fields.id""").strip()
# Bare-IP-literal gate: parity with kamcmd_block.sh / autoban_loop.sh. Also the
# SQL-injection guard for the enrichment queries below (srcip is attacker input).
if not re.fullmatch(r"[0-9A-Fa-f.:]{3,45}", srcip):
    srcip = ""
if not rule_id.isdigit():
    rule_id = "0"
if not rule_level.isdigit():
    rule_level = "0"
alert_id = re.sub(r"[^0-9A-Za-z._-]", "", alert_id)[:64]
print(json.dumps({
    "srcip": srcip,
    "rule_id": rule_id,
    "rule_level": rule_level,
    "alert_id": alert_id,
    "valid": "true" if srcip else "false",
}))

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: SELECT count() AS recent_cases FROM ngn_sip.soar_cases WHERE src_ip = '$parse_alert.message.srcip' AND case_time > now64(3) - INTERVAL $soar_dedup_window_seconds SECOND AND graded_action != 'dedup_suppressed' FORMAT JSONEachRow

parameters.name: verify
parameters.description: Whether to check the certificate or not

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Add a timeout for the request, in seconds

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: SELECT argMax(predicted_class, scored_at) AS predicted_class, argMax(proba, scored_at) AS proba, count() AS n FROM ngn_sip.ml_scores WHERE src_ip = '$parse_alert.message.srcip' AND scored_at > now64(3) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR FORMAT JSONEachRow

parameters.name: verify
parameters.description: Whether to check the certificate or not

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Add a timeout for the request, in seconds

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: SELECT argMax(verdict, verdict_time) AS verdict, argMax(confidence, verdict_time) AS confidence, count() AS n FROM ngn_sip.llm_verdicts WHERE replaceOne(toString(src_ip), '::ffff:', '') = '$parse_alert.message.srcip' AND verdict_time > now64(3) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR FORMAT JSONEachRow

parameters.name: verify
parameters.description: Whether to check the certificate or not

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Add a timeout for the request, in seconds

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: SELECT count() AS alert_count, topK(1)(signature)[1] AS top_signature FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts WHERE src_ip = '$parse_alert.message.srcip' AND event_time > now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE FORMAT JSONEachRow

parameters.name: verify
parameters.description: Whether to check the certificate or not

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Add a timeout for the request, in seconds

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The code to run. Can be a file ID from within Shuffle.
parameters.value:
import json, uuid

def _s(v, d=""):
    v = str(v).strip()
    return d if v == "" or v.startswith("$") or v == "None" else v

def _f(v, d=0.0):
    try:
        return float(str(v).strip())
    except Exception:
        return d

def _i(v, d=0):
    try:
        return int(float(str(v).strip()))
    except Exception:
        return d

srcip = _s("""$parse_alert.message.srcip""")
rule_id = _i("""$parse_alert.message.rule_id""")
rule_level = _i("""$parse_alert.message.rule_level""")
alert_id = _s("""$parse_alert.message.alert_id""")
recent_cases = _i("""$dedup_check.body.recent_cases""")
ml_class = _s("""$enrich_ml.body.predicted_class""")
ml_proba = _f("""$enrich_ml.body.proba""")
ml_rows = _i("""$enrich_ml.body.n""")
llm_verdict = _s("""$enrich_llm.body.verdict""")
llm_conf = _f("""$enrich_llm.body.confidence""")
llm_rows = _i("""$enrich_llm.body.n""")
suri_count = _i("""$enrich_suricata.body.alert_count""")
top_sig = _s("""$enrich_suricata.body.top_signature""")
ban_thr = _f("""$attack_score_ban_threshold""", 0.85)
low_thr = _f("""$attack_score_low_threshold""", 0.55)
ml_high = _f("""$ml_attack_score_high""", 0.90)
notify_url = _s("""$notify_webhook_url""")
notify_configured = notify_url not in ("", "disabled")

# Graded-response policy (docs/09_soar_runbook.md). Stage 1/2 outputs INFORM
# the decision; the deterministic autoban backstop is unaffected.
llm_corroborates = (llm_verdict == "malicious" and llm_conf >= 0.6) or (
    llm_verdict == "suspicious" and llm_conf >= 0.8)
ml_corroborates = (ml_proba >= ml_high and ml_class not in ("", "normal", "benign")) or (
    ml_proba >= ban_thr)

if recent_cases > 0:
    action = "dedup_suppressed"
    reason = "recent non-suppressed case for this src_ip within dedup window"
elif rule_level >= 10 and (llm_corroborates or ml_corroborates or rule_level >= 12):
    action = "ban"
    why = []
    if llm_corroborates:
        why.append("stage2 " + llm_verdict + " conf " + str(llm_conf))
    if ml_corroborates:
        why.append("ml " + (ml_class or "n/a") + " proba " + str(ml_proba))
    if rule_level >= 12:
        why.append("wazuh level " + str(rule_level) + " >= 12")
    reason = "corroborated: " + "; ".join(why)
elif llm_verdict in ("suspicious", "needs_review") or (low_thr <= ml_proba < ban_thr):
    action = "rate_limit_notify"
    reason = "mid-confidence: stage2 " + (llm_verdict or "n/a") + " / ml proba " + str(ml_proba) + "; rely on PIKE edge rate limit"
else:
    action = "log_only"
    reason = "below low threshold " + str(low_thr) + " and no stage2 corroboration; FP candidate"

should_ban = action == "ban"
notify_planned = 1 if (notify_configured and action in ("ban", "rate_limit_notify")) else 0

case_row = {
    "case_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
    "src_ip": srcip,
    "wazuh_rule_id": rule_id,
    "wazuh_rule_level": rule_level,
    "graded_action": action,
    "stage2_verdict": llm_verdict,
    "stage2_confidence": llm_conf,
    "ml_attack_score": ml_proba,
    "ml_predicted_label": ml_class,
    "suricata_alert_count": suri_count,
    "dedup_key": srcip,
    "workflow_id": "sip_response_orchestration",
    "execution_id": "",
    "notify_sent": notify_planned,
    "evidence_json": json.dumps({
        "wazuh_alert_id": alert_id,
        "decision_reason": reason,
        "ml_rows": ml_rows,
        "llm_rows": llm_rows,
        "suricata_top_signature": top_sig,
        "thresholds": {"ban": ban_thr, "low": low_thr, "ml_high": ml_high},
    }),
}
print(json.dumps({
    "graded_action": action,
    "should_ban": "true" if should_ban else "false",
    "notify": "true" if notify_planned else "false",
    "reason": reason,
    "case_row": case_row,
}))

parameters.value:
INSERT INTO ngn_sip.soar_cases (case_id, src_ip, wazuh_rule_id, wazuh_rule_level, graded_action, stage2_verdict, stage2_confidence, ml_attack_score, ml_predicted_label, suricata_alert_count, dedup_key, workflow_id, execution_id, notify_sent, evidence_json) FORMAT JSONEachRow
$decide.message.case_row
